description_long: This is a classic outdoor bench featuring a seat and backrest made from evenly spaced, horizontal wooden slats. The wood is light brown with visible grain and occasional knots, giving it a natural, rustic appearance. The bench is supported by two robust, cast metal legs on either end, which have a textured, stone-like finish in a dark gray color. The design is open and airy, with gaps between the slats for drainage and comfort. The bench lacks armrests, emphasizing a minimalist and functional style. Its sturdy construction and weather-resistant materials make it ideal for parks, sidewalks, or other public outdoor spaces.
description: A sturdy outdoor bench with light wooden slats and textured dark metal legs, featuring a backrest but no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, highlighting the horizontal wooden slats and both metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the angled backrest and the thickness of the wooden slats, as well as the profile of the metal leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slats and the symmetry of the metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slat arrangement and the other metal leg profile.
attribute_leg_design: two thick, textured cast iron supports
